hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.description: Find answers to the most common questions about our services, pricing, and technology

questions.question: What services do you offer?
questions.answer: We offer web development, design, and consulting services tailored to your business needs.

questions.question: How long does a typical project take?
questions.answer: Most projects take between 4 and 12 weeks depending on scope and complexity.

questions.question: Do you offer free trials?
questions.answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on all plans. No credit card required.

questions.question: Can I change my plan later?
questions.answer: Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your dashboard.

questions.question: What technologies do you use?
questions.answer: We build with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS for fast and scalable websites.

questions.question: Is my data secure?
questions.answer: Yes. We use industry-standard encryption and follow best practices for data security.
